name: Pratul Singh Raghava
title: Software Engineer & Product Lead
tagline: Loves ABCD - Anything Backend Cloud & Data

rating.source: Based on LinkedIn endorsements & peer reviews

bio.short: Software Engineer & Product Lead (First Class Honours, USYD) who builds production-grade systems end to end - and owns the product decisions that go with them, from AI pipelines and cloud infrastructure to App Store deployment and monetisation design.
bio.full:
I am a Software Engineer & Product Lead (First Class Honours, USYD) who builds production-grade systems end to end. I lead engineering and product for Done Life, an AI-first productivity platform, owning the full lifecycle from cloud infrastructure and AI pipelines through to monetisation, App Store compliance, and CI/CD - and I'm the sole feature engineer shipping BackupMeraki, a Cisco Meraki backup/restore SaaS platform, at Nexivity.

Being the entire technical team at Done Life means every product call passes through me too: I've scrapped a year of no-code tooling for a working prototype built in a day, designed the subscription and entitlement system end to end, and built an offline AI-eval harness to A/B test model trade-offs on data instead of instinct - the kind of decision that sits right at the intersection of engineering and product.

My technical foundation spans field-level AES-256-GCM encryption, Terraform-provisioned GCP and AWS infrastructure, OpenAI Responses API with strict JSON schema and timezone-aware extraction, and GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines. At Accenture I acted as a force multiplier, automating security provisioning workflows and cutting manual effort by 80%. Beyond code, I led the USYD Robotics Club from 230 to 1,800+ members as President, and I excel at translating ambiguous requirements into shipped software across compliance, data modelling, and product roadmaps.

coreThemes.title: Build-Run-Own-Decide
coreThemes.description: I don't just write code; I architect the solution, manage the cloud operations, handle the compliance (GDPR to App Store verification), and make the product calls that decide what gets built next.

coreThemes.title: AI & Scalability
coreThemes.description: I build systems that handle complexity—from scaling database permissions at Accenture to running data-driven trade-off analysis (an offline eval harness, A/B'd reasoning-effort levels) before shipping AI changes.

coreThemes.title: Clarity
coreThemes.description: I excel at translating technical trade-offs for non-technical stakeholders (founders, clients, students, leadership).

trivia.fact: Can name every country in the world in under 10 minutes
Has FlightRadar24 permanently open for planespotting
Plays chess (rating is... a work in progress)
Scaled USYD Robotics Club from 230 to 1,800+ members
Once accidentally brought down a database at Accenture, then turned it into a security win
Managed a crisis when 1,100 people signed up for a 60-person event
